name: Jagasaki - No longer Human
description:
Born because her mother was raped by a strange man, Rin Jagasaki is a woman who is hated by her own mother, she keeps getting abused, sexually harassed, and even raped by her stepfather. Rin Jagasaki, a woman who never felt warmth and smiles in her life, she grew up with such a toxic family, her biological father left irresponsibly after raping her mother, her mother was a prostitute and taught Rin indecent things, her stepfather was a bastard and drug dealer.

art by TABAO
